meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Overcome project paralysis with this advanced guide. Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build high-impact AI apps that launch your career.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold complex architectures and Antigravity to bridge the gap between abstract requirements and production-ready code. By treating your IDE as an autonomous pair-programmer, you transform vague concepts into tangible, portfolio-grade software in mere hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the greatest enemy of the aspiring engineer. You have the theoretical knowledge, the syntax, and the drive, yet the paralysis of 'what to build' keeps you stagnant. It is a cycle of tutorial hell that drains your momentum and leaves your GitHub profile barren.

But the paradigm has shifted. With Claude Code and Antigravity, the barrier between thought and execution has collapsed. You are no longer just a coder; you are an architect overseeing a high-velocity AI engine. This guide is your blueprint to move from idle student to active builder, turning technical capability into a competitive advantage.

steps.title: Define the Problem Domain
steps.description: Narrow your focus to a specific niche to avoid scope creep. Use Antigravity to generate a high-utility project specification based on current market gaps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a technical product manager. Generate 3 high-impact SaaS project ideas for a student portfolio that solve a real-world problem using AI agents. Focus on vertical SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a project requirements document for a [Chosen Idea]'

steps.title: Architect the Tech Stack
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation. Use Claude Code to scaffold your repository with modern best practices, including TypeScript, Zod, and optimized API routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a scalable folder structure and tech stack recommendation for a full-stack AI application using Next.js, Supabase, and Claude Code.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a new project with the architecture defined by Antigravity'

steps.title: Implement Core Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'Unique Value Proposition' of your app. Let Claude handle the boilerplate while you review the logic flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a clean, modular service layer for handling AI-generated data streams in a Next.js environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude code 'Implement the core business logic service for [Feature Name]'

steps.title: Integration Testing
steps.description: Ensure your components interact correctly. Automate the verification of your API endpoints using Claude's diagnostic capabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests for the AI service layer to ensure data integrity and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run integration tests and fix any failing dependencies'

steps.title: Refine and Deploy
steps.description: Polishing the UI and final deployment configuration. Use Claude to optimize your production build settings.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify performance bottlenecks in the current codebase and suggest optimizations for production deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Optimize the build configuration for production and generate a README.md'

pro_tips: Always instruct Claude to explain the 'why' behind its code suggestions to accelerate your own engineering intuition.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative constraints'—forcing the AI to avoid common, bloated libraries that slow down your project.
Commit your code after every significant Claude-assisted milestone to maintain a granular, impressive Git history for recruiters.
Use the '--chat' flag in Claude Code to iteratively refine complex logic before letting the tool write the files.
Treat your project as a product by using Antigravity to generate a 'Product Roadmap' file that you keep in your root directory.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, deploy it to Vercel and write a case study blog post detailing the architecture you built with Claude.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming about the perfect project and start shipping the one that gets you hired. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
